claims.detail: Simulator topology claim: API Management centralizes authentication, quotas, and route policies for B2B traffic.

findings.description: Azure API Management products segment partners while backend microservices stay on private VNets.
findings.recommendation: Add synthetic monitors per API version before promoting breaking contract changes.

findings.description: Client certificates from the enterprise CA gate strategic partner subnets alongside JWT scopes.
findings.recommendation: Automate certificate rotation alerts and revoke flows tied to offboarded partners.
